'''shasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woefully|woefully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woefully|woefully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shasate|shasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shasatesher|shasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasatesherĂ«m|shasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shasatero|shasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasateshĂ«|shasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasateshĂ«m|shasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishasatero|gokishasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasateshĂ«|gokishasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasateshĂ«m|gokishasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshasankerom|goshasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasankeshĂ«|goshasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasankeshĂ«m|goshasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshasankeya|goshasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shasaterom|shasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasatemu|shasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shasateya|shasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishasaterom|gokishasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasatemu|gokishasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishasateya|gokishasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shasasate|shasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shasasatesher|shasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasasatesherĂ«m|shasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shasasatero|shasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasasateshĂ«|shasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasasateshĂ«m|shasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishasasatero|gokishasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasasateshĂ«|gokishasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasasateshĂ«m|gokishasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshasasankerom|goshasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasasankeshĂ«|goshasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasasankeshĂ«m|goshasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshasasankeya|goshasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shasasaterom|shasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasasatemu|shasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shasasateya|shasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishasasaterom|gokishasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasasatemu|gokishasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishasasateya|gokishasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠte|shĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠtesher|shĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠtero|shĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠtero|gokishĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠsĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠsĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠtemu|shĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠsĂŠteya|shĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠterom|gokishĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠsĂŠteya|gokishĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafsafte|shafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafsaftesher|shafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafsaftesherĂ«m|shafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafsaftero|shafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafsafteshĂ«|shafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafsafteshĂ«m|shafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafsaftero|gokishafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafsafteshĂ«|gokishafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafsafteshĂ«m|gokishafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafsafnkerom|goshafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafsafnkeshĂ«|goshafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafsafnkeshĂ«m|goshafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafsafnkeya|goshafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafsafterom|shafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafsaftemu|shafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafsafteya|shafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafsafterom|gokishafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafsaftemu|gokishafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafsafteya|gokishafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
